2001 Cherokee Dr
Estes Park, CO 80517

Arapaho Estates — Walkout Ranch — 3,052 Sq Ft — 4 Bed / 4 Bath — MLS #1056445 — 1.14 Acres

📅 Open House Jul 11 & 12 · 1–3 PM

✅ Backs to Open Space
Built 2008 · $392/sqft · Central A/C
Wayne and Michelle — This one checks most of your boxes directly. Main level primary suite with 5-piece bath and walk-in closet. Open concept kitchen with knotty alder cabinetry, granite, dual-fuel range, walk-in pantry. Stone fireplace in the living room with vaulted ceilings. The walkout basement adds a full guest suite, two more bedrooms, a second gas fireplace, and a bonus room. It backs to open space — no rear neighbors ever. The open house is July 11–12 at 1 PM; walk through and pay attention to how the kitchen flows and how the views read from the deck. — Zachary

✅ Strong Matches for Your Priorities: Main level primary suite with 5-piece bath — soaking tub, dual sinks, granite, seamless glass walk-in shower, walk-in closet. Open-concept kitchen/dining/living with knotty alder cabinetry, granite, dual-fuel range, walk-in pantry. Stone fireplace, vaulted ceilings, log accents. Wraparound redwood deck 72’×27’. Backs to open space. City water and sewer.
⚠️ Evaluate at the Showing: At 74 DOM and vacant, there is likely room to negotiate. Walk the deck and check its condition. The redwood deck is large — ask about last treatment date. Verify 1GB fiber is actually installed, not just available. The half bath on the main level is only 5’1”×5’5” — small but functional. Confirm HOA architectural review requirements if you plan any exterior changes.

Full Feature Breakdown
From MLS data and seller’s additional features supplement
🍳 Kitchen
  • Knotty alder cabinets with under-cabinet lighting
  • Natural edge granite counters with tile backsplash
  • GE Profile dual-fuel range — gas cooktop, electric double ovens
  • LG French door 4-door fridge with regular and craft ice makers
  • GE Profile microwave · LG QuadWash dishwasher
  • Ruvati workstation sink
  • Large walk-in pantry with frosted glass door
  • Wood floors · LED recessed lighting
🏠 Living Room
  • Floor-to-ceiling stacked stone fireplace with mantel
  • Vaulted ceilings with log accent beams
  • Wood floors · gas fireplace · ceiling fan
  • View-facing windows — light and bright
  • French doors to wraparound redwood deck
  • Open flow to dining and kitchen
🛌 Primary Suite (Main Level)
  • Walk-in closet · remote controlled ceiling fan
  • 5-piece bath: dual sinks with granite counters
  • Seamless glass expansive walk-in shower
  • Soaking tub
  • Large vanity with cabinets and drawers
  • Main level — single-story living achievable
🏠 Basement Level
  • Family room with gas fireplace, stacked stone
  • Walk-out to lower patio
  • 2nd primary / guest suite with ensuite bath & walk-in closet
  • Two additional bedrooms
  • 3rd full bath — granite, tile surround
  • Bonus room (wine room / exercise / office)
🏠 Exterior & Outdoor
  • Wraparound redwood deck — 72’×27’
  • Lower patio off walkout basement
  • Storm doors with screen and glass inserts
  • 1.14 ac backing to open space · southern exposure
  • Asphalt driveway · Pella windows
⚙️ Mechanical & Systems
  • High efficiency furnace — new 2022
  • Central air conditioning · whole house humidifier
  • Two 50-gallon water heaters with recirculating pump
  • Smart thermostat · 1GB fiber available
  • 2-car garage: drywalled, insulated, floor drain
  • Schlage locksets · solid wood doors
🆔 Laundry (Main Level)
  • Tile floors with floor drain
  • Laundry sink and cabinets
  • Counter for folding · storage shelving
  • Washer/dryer hookups (units excluded)
📍 Location & Views
  • Base of Prospect Mountain · backs to open space
  • Back range / snow-capped views from deck and living room
  • Within Estes Park city limits
  • Minutes to Lake Estes, RMNP, downtown Estes Park
  • South-facing — maximum sun year-round

Market Context & Comparable Listings
Active Estes Park listings — similar price tier
📌 Pricing Context: At $1,195,000 ($392/sqft) with 74 DOM and vacant, there is likely negotiating room. The main-level primary suite, city utilities, and open space backing are rare at this price point. Most comparables are either smaller with higher $/sqft or larger with more days on market.

Roof Certification
Third-party inspection by Jereb Construction — April 9, 2026
✅ Roof Certified — Good Condition
Inspector: Rich Jereb · Jereb Construction · 970-599-5338
Date: April 9, 2026 · Shingle: Tamko Heritage 50-year — installed 2008
Warranty Remaining: 32 years
Condition: No loose or fractured shingles. All penetration flashings in good condition with good rubber seals. No abnormal granule loss or ridge cap/vent issues.
Life Expectancy: Minimum 5–8 years from inspection
Certification: 5-year roof certification issued
Key Takeaway
50-year architectural shingle with 32 years of warranty remaining. 5-year cert provides contractual protection. In Estes Park where hail and snow loading are real considerations, a clean roof cert is meaningful. Not a liability item going into inspection.
